headline: P&L exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹34.7 Cr indirect (β cascade, speculative)
what_matters: Triggers GRI:207 (Tax), ESRS G1 (Business Conduct); non-compliance could escalate to SEBI/RBI inquiries and further penalties if precedent is set.
Potential P/E compression of 0.1x due to earnings revision and negative sentiment; direct revenue at risk is ₹6.3 Cr, with total exposure at ₹85.1 Cr.
The penalty and governance concerns may widen bond spreads and trigger FII outflows, raising the bank's cost of capital by an estimated ₹7.6 Cr.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹34.7 Cr indirect (β cascade, speculative)
Revenue at risk: ₹6.3 Cr direct revenue impact
